title: J065--RALS for Hemochron Signature Elites Brand Name or Equal at the Central Arkansas VA Healthcare System
name: RALS for Hemochron Signature Elites Brand Name or
statement_of_work: The Contractor shall provide all software licenses, interfaces, services, training, and support necessary to connect the Hemochron Signature Elites analyzers to the existing RALS system and ensure compliant data management. Brand Name or Equal: When the government lists a specific brand‑name product in a solicitation, vendors are not required to offer that exact brand. They may offer a different product as long as it meets all the important features and performance requirements listed in the solicitation. These required features are called salient characteristics.
deliverables: Execute scope of work described in the RALS for Hemochron Signature Elites Brand Name or solicitation
Deliver milestones, status reporting, and acceptance documentation
Provide final handoff and post-deployment support per RFP terms
dept: VETERANS AFFAIRS, DEPARTMENT OF.VETERANS AFFAIRS, DEPARTMENT OF.256-NETWORK CONTRACT OFFICE 16 (36C256)
description: The Contractor shall provide all software licenses, interfaces, services, training, and support necessary to connect the Hemochron Signature Elites analyzers to the existing RALS system and ensure compliant data management. Brand Name or Equal: When the government lists a specific brand‑name product in a solicitation, vendors are not required to offer that exact brand. They may offer a different product as long as it meets all the important features and performance requirements listed in the solicitation. These required features are called salient characteristics. Clearly identify what product they are offering.

place_of_performance.streetAddress: Department of Veterans Affairs Central Arkansas VA Healthcare System (CAVHS)
